interpretation_notes: delta = ablated - full: negative means layer helps.
no_appraisal is a no-op: no appraisal engine configured in realistic benchmark.
dual_path uses KeywordAppraisalEngine + elaborate(); He1 FAIL expected (keyword appraisal degrades affect on this dataset, same as G3/Addendum A).
no_reconsolidation disables APE-gated reconsolidation window; update_prediction (predictive learning) still runs.
aft_keyword_synchronous: synchronous keyword appraisal (Addendum F baseline); compare vs dual_path for Hf1 — does deferral mitigate destructive override?
Holm denominator = 7 (all non-full variants); adding aft_keyword_synchronous slightly increases p_adj for existing variants.
N=100 queries (v1.4 expansion); directional trends are informative even if not all results survive correction.
